pledge_delivery_score.source: MLA Tracker — voting record and pledge analysis
pledge_delivery_score.method: Weighted pledge delivery: backed pledges score 100, partial 50, mismatch 0. MLA-specific pledges weighted 60%, party platform 40%.

party_line_voting_pct.method: Division votes where MLA's recorded vote matches party whip position, Jan 2022–May 2026. Excludes free votes and abstentions on conscience matters.

chamber_contributions_total.method: Count of unique contributions (debates, questions, statements) attributed to this MLA in Official Report, Jan 2022–May 2026.

committee_attendance_pct.method: Meetings attended as proportion of meetings scheduled, all committees on which MLA sits. Approved absences excluded.

pledge_delivery_score.source: MLA Tracker — voting record and pledge analysis
pledge_delivery_score.method: Weighted pledge delivery. Score reduced significantly by 22-month Stormont boycott during which no Executive function operated.

party_line_voting_pct.method: Division votes where MLA's recorded vote matches party whip position, Jan 2022–May 2026. Excludes free votes.

chamber_contributions_total.method: Count of unique contributions attributed to this MLA in Official Report. Lower total reflects boycott period absence.

committee_attendance_pct.method: Meetings attended as proportion of meetings scheduled. Low score reflects boycott period where committees were suspended.

pledge_delivery_score.source: MLA Tracker — voting record and pledge analysis
pledge_delivery_score.method: Weighted pledge delivery. Score reflects partial delivery on healthcare and housing against an ambitious manifesto under constrained budgets.

party_line_voting_pct.method: Division votes where MLA's recorded vote matches party whip position.

chamber_contributions_total.method: Count of unique contributions attributed to this MLA in Official Report.

committee_attendance_pct.method: Meetings attended as proportion of meetings scheduled.

pledge_delivery_score.source: MLA Tracker — voting record and pledge analysis
pledge_delivery_score.method: Weighted pledge delivery. UUP in opposition for extended periods; delivery scored on influence over legislation and private members' bills.

party_line_voting_pct.method: Division votes where MLA's recorded vote matches party whip position. Lower than average reflects documented votes of conscience.

chamber_contributions_total.method: Count of unique contributions attributed to this MLA in Official Report.

committee_attendance_pct.method: Meetings attended as proportion of meetings scheduled.

pledge_delivery_score.source: MLA Tracker — voting record and pledge analysis
pledge_delivery_score.method: Weighted pledge delivery. As opposition leader, delivery scored primarily on voting record alignment, private members' bills, and committee interventions rather than executive decisions.

party_line_voting_pct.method: Division votes where MLA's recorded vote matches party whip position.

chamber_contributions_total.method: Count of unique contributions attributed to this MLA in Official Report.

committee_attendance_pct.method: Meetings attended as proportion of meetings scheduled.
